fields.name: Contact No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number of the contact company you are assigning a Web source.
When you assign a Web source to a contact from the contact card, the program copies the contact number from the No. field in the Contact table.

fields.name: Web Source Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the Web source code. This field is not editable.

fields.name: Search Word
fields.tooltip: Specifies the search word to search for information about the contact on the Internet.

fields.name: Web Source Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the Web source you have assigned to the contact.

fields.name: Contact Name
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the name of the contact company to which you are assigning a Web source.
When you assign a Web source to a contact from the contact card, the program automatically copies the contact name from the Name field on the contact card.
